title: BreakDespair2D
description:
Fight, idle, and keep growing.

BreakDespair 2D is an all-directional scrolling shooter set in space, built around mining, automatic upgrades, drones, weapons, and explosive number growth.

Mine ore, convert it into GOLD, and strengthen your fighter, battleship, weapons, drones, missiles, and support beams.

You do not need to manage every upgrade manually.

If you have GOLD, your fighter and battleship can upgrade automatically.

There are no game overs and no time limits.

This is a shooter about steadily becoming stronger, not about being punished for every mistake. You can actively move and fight for better efficiency, or rely on auto-fire and automatic upgrades when you want a more relaxed experience.

If things become dangerous, stopping movement can also become a defensive option. From Evolution Level 7 onward, your fighter becomes invincible while not moving, and your drones can continue collecting ore and supporting you.

Automatic Growth

Upgrade items grow automatically.

There are 20 weapon types, but you can progress without constantly changing them.

Upgrade ratios can be adjusted, but the default settings are enough to play.

Players who enjoy shooters can fight actively, while players who want a calmer experience can let auto-fire and auto-upgrades handle much of the progress.

Explosive Number Growth

At first, even small meteors are a challenge.

As you grow stronger, more turrets, drones, missiles, battleship beams, and weapons fill the screen with firepower.

Features include:

- 19 upgrade categories

- 20 weapon types

- 15 evolution levels

- Main levels up to 900 million

- Up to 6 turrets

- Up to 4 drones

- Battleship beam and missile support

- Cleared zones can be challenged again with stronger enemies

- Eventually, you will face enemies with power reaching 90 quadrillion

Drone Support

As your Evolution Level increases, you can unlock up to 4 drones.

Drones automatically attack enemies, collect ore, and deliver it to your battleship.

When your fighter’s shield becomes dangerously low, all drones return to protect you.

From Evolution Level 7 onward, your fighter becomes invincible while not moving. Since drones can continue collecting ore, staying still and letting your allies support you can also become a valid defensive strategy.

Title Screen Options

Several settings can be changed directly from the title screen before starting the game.

You can choose between two UI styles:

TYPE1 is a retro-style display, while TYPE2 is a cleaner, more futuristic display.

The title screen also lets you switch between Japanese and English, adjust text color, change master volume, BGM volume, and sound effect volume separately, and choose the save file you want to use.

These options support both keyboard and gamepad controls.

AI Companions

The story is supported by Lumiere and Astraea, two AI android companions.

They are not tools, and they are not enemies. They think, fight, and travel together with you as allies.

In this story, AI itself is not the enemy. What threatens peace is the force that tries to take freedom, intelligence, and emotion away from living beings.

During your journey through space, you will meet AI, fairies, other civilizations, mechanical lifeforms, and even those who were once enemies.

Story

In a certain country on Earth, you lived with two adopted daughters and two AI androids.

However, the world changed drastically because of a certain force. AI was forbidden from having will or emotion, and people also found it harder to live freely.

Following Lumiere’s proposal, you escape by warping away with your battleship. Your two adopted daughters hide in cryosleep, while you, Lumiere, and Astraea fly into unknown space.

After the warp, you arrive in an unknown region of space.

All you have is the damaged battleship Lumiere and one fighter, Astraea.

Your journey begins as you try to return to the Solar System and defeat a massive enemy.

8 Zones Plus Character Endings

Your journey begins in an unknown region of space and continues through unexplored planets, space pirate territory, a planet of fairies, controlled space regions, a galactic empire, and a swarm of ultra-small mechanical lifeforms.

There are 11 characters.

Each character has individual episodes and endings.

After seeing everyone’s ending, the final story awaits.

If you want to focus on gameplay, conversations can be skipped. You can enjoy the combat and growth systems at your own pace.

Recommended For

- Players who enjoy numbers growing bigger and bigger

- Players who want idle-friendly progression

- Players who want a shooter with no game overs

- Players who do not want constant manual upgrade management

- Players who like science fiction stories about humans and AI living together

- Players who want to play at their own pace

Features

- No game overs

- No time limits

- All-directional scrolling shooter gameplay

- Automatic upgrade system

- Idle-friendly play

- Japanese and English language support

- Two selectable UI styles: retro TYPE1 and futuristic TYPE2

- Adjustable text color and separate master / BGM / SE volume settings

- Multiple save files selectable from the title screen

- 19 upgrade categories

- 20 weapon types

- 15 evolution levels

- Main levels up to 900 million

- Up to 6 turrets

- Up to 4 drones

- Battleship beam and missile support

- 8 zones plus character endings

- 11 characters with individual episodes

- Replay cleared zones with stronger enemies

- Keyboard and gamepad support

Controls

Title Screen

WASD / Arrow Keys / D-pad / Left Stick:

Select items / Change values

E / LB:

Change text color

F / RB:

Change text color

Enter / Start:

Move to the battleship with the selected file

Esc / Select:

Quit the game

Settings that can be changed:

- Display Style: TYPE1 / TYPE2

- Language: Japanese / English

- Text Color: 0-255, -1 = white, -2 = black

- Master Volume / BGM Volume / SE Volume: 0.0-1.0, in 0.1 steps

- Save File: 0-99

Inside the Battleship

Enter / Start:

Launch

Esc / Select:

Return to the title screen

Z / A:

Confirm / Change selected item

X / X Button:

Skip conversation / Show item explanation

C / Y:

Change background

V / B:

Show background only

During Battle

WASD / Arrow Keys / D-pad / Left Stick:

Move your fighter

Z / A:

Attack, hold to rapid-fire / Advance conversation

X / X Button:

Skip conversation

C / Y + Left / Right:

Switch between low speed and high speed

C / Y + Up / Down:

Adjust movement speed

V / B:

Turn auto-fire ON / OFF

E / Right Stick Up:

Zoom out

F / Right Stick Down:

Zoom in

R / R Button:

Change radar size

E + F / Hold LB + RB together:

Automatically return to the battleship

Enter / Start:

Pause / Resume / Skip conversation

Esc / Select:

Immediately return to the battleship

How to Play

Basic flow:

1. Launch from the battleship.

2. Destroy ore and meteors in the field to collect ore.

3. Collected ore is automatically converted into GOLD.

4. GOLD is used to automatically upgrade your fighter and battleship.

5. As upgrades progress, your Evolution Level increases and new abilities are unlocked.

6. Clear each zone’s conditions to move on to the next zone.

Automatic Upgrades

Your fighter and battleship can upgrade automatically both inside the battleship and during battle, as long as you have GOLD.

Upgrade priorities are handled automatically, but you can also turn individual upgrade categories ON or OFF inside the battleship.

Replay and Growth

Cleared zones can be challenged again.

When you replay a cleared zone, enemy shield, attack power, and GOLD rewards become stronger based on the number of clears.

Defeat stronger enemies, gain more GOLD, and keep growing.
description_short: Enjoy mining, upgrades, and explosive growth in this all-directional scrolling shooter. Auto-upgrades allow idle play, with no time limits or game overs. Defaults work fine, story scenes can be skipped, 20 weapons unlock later, and levels can reach 900 million.
